description_long: This is a tall, rectangular bookcase featuring five evenly spaced wooden shelves supported by a sturdy black metal frame. The frame consists of four vertical posts at each corner, connected by horizontal bars at the top, bottom, and between each shelf for stability. The shelves are made of light-colored wood with a smooth, matte finish, providing a warm contrast to the industrial look of the metal frame. The open-back and open-side design allows for easy access to items from multiple angles and gives the bookcase a minimalist, airy appearance. The structure is robust and designed to hold books, decor, or storage bins, making it suitable for both residential and urban public spaces. Its clean lines and neutral materials make it versatile for various environments such as offices, libraries, or community centers.
description: A tall, five-shelf bookcase with light wood shelves and a black metal frame, featuring an open, minimalist design. The structure is sturdy and visually balanced, suitable for modern urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five wooden shelves framed by black metal, with open sides and back.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile, the thickness of the shelves, and the depth of the frame.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, displaying the open-back design and shelf arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the shelf depth and frame structure.
